rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RITA T. YEARWOOD REV. LIVING TR DATE 11/1/1999 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: The motion to expunge lis pendens is granted. In light of the admmissible evidence presented by Respondents and the applicable presumptions, the evidence presented by Petitioners does not persuade the Court by a preponderance of the evidence that Petitioners' real property claim is probably valid. Petitioners have not carried their burden of showing either that Ms. Yearwood lacked testamentary (or other legal) capacity in 1999 or that her 1999 testamentary documents were the product of undue influence. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise opposing parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, July 11, 2017.
